MINI MINUTES: Commissioner Everett Hewlett Jr.; Clerk: NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Amish Patel, is present.
Attorney, Michael Hall, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Wanda Snyder, is present.
Attorney, Aaron Morrison , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of DEC-13-2010 is vacated.
